TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Mangacun, title = Mangacun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mangacun} }

S.FORM: = Maia/Mangacun/Mangacun = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Namasyacyu ka alang Maia/Mangacun/Mangacun. 218 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 788 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 757 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 31 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun60%, Paiwan 5%, Tayal3 %, Amis1%, Cou10%, Hla'alua 7%, Kanakanavu 9%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = maia/maŋaʦun/maŋaʦun = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu namasjaʦju ka alaŋ maia/maŋaʦun/maŋaʦun. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, paiwan *%, tajal* %, amis*%, ʦou**%, ħla'alua *%, kanakana*u *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
S.FORM: = Maia/Mangacun/Mangacun = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Namasyacyu ka alang Maia/Mangacun/Mangacun. 218 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 788 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 757 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 31 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun60%, Paiwan 5%, Tayal3 %, Amis1%, Cou10%, Hla'alua 7%, Kanakanavu 9%, ni rahuq na o 1%.
S.PHON: = maia/maŋaʦun/maŋaʦun = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu namasjaʦju ka alaŋ maia/maŋaʦun/maŋaʦun. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun**%, paiwan *%, tajal* %, amis*%, ʦou**%, ħla'alua *%, kanakana*u *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%.
